title: sida pusilla
intro: Sida pusilla, also known as the small sida or small flower sida, is a flowering plant species native to Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sida pusilla include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Sida pusilla is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
